title: SRI (Subresource Integrity)
description: Analyze the function of Subresource Integrity (SRI) in verifying third-party assets. Implement SRI to cryptographically ensure the integrity of CDN-delivered resources. Evaluate how SRI prevents supply-chain attacks targeting network-delivered assets.
objectives: Analyze the function of Subresource Integrity (SRI) in verifying third-party assets.
Implement SRI to cryptographically ensure the integrity of CDN-delivered resources.
Evaluate how SRI prevents supply-chain attacks targeting network-delivered assets.
